emails.subject: Re: Update--Day 1 of California PUC Hearings
emails.body: Re: Update--Day 1 of California PUC Hearings Jeff Thank you for the comprehensive coverage. I know you have a lot going on, with many to communicate with to. If you could, please add Jeff Messina/HOU/EES, Douglas Huth/HOU/EES, Richard Leibert/HOU/EES, to your distribution lists. Thank you again Dan From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 12/27/2000 08:57 PM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON
